site.headlineZh: 把东方想象力拍成下一代 AI 影像
site.headlineEn: Turning Chinese imagination into cinematic AI worlds
site.introZh: AIGosling 专注 AI 短片、角色 IP、视觉实验与创作教程，用电影工业的方法训练人工智能的想象力。
site.introEn: AIGosling builds AI short films, character IP, visual experiments, and practical creative tutorials with a cinematic production mindset.
site.aboutZh: 我把十多年影视制作经验带入 AI 影像创作：从角色设定、分镜、镜头语言到世界观包装，让 AI 不只是生成画面，而是服务于叙事、情绪和原创 IP。
site.aboutEn: I bring more than a decade of film and television production experience into AI image-making, using character design, storyboarding, camera language, and world-building to turn generation into real storytelling.

works.descriptionZh: 以《山海经》气质为灵感的 AI 奇幻短片实验，探索东方怪谈、雾气、古建筑和角色凝视。
works.descriptionEn: An AI fantasy short experiment inspired by the atmosphere of Chinese myth, combining strange tales, mist, old architecture, and intense character close-ups.

works.descriptionZh: 霓虹、雨夜、无人机镜头与高速剪辑构成的都市 AI 视觉测试，偏向商业预告片节奏。
works.descriptionEn: A neon city experiment with rain, drone-like camera moves, and trailer-paced editing.

works.descriptionZh: 围绕一个原创角色做多风格一致性测试，包含服饰、表情、动作、场景光线统一。
works.descriptionEn: A consistency study for an original character across wardrobe, expression, action, and lighting.

tutorials.titleZh: AI 短片从 0 到 1 的工作流
tutorials.titleEn: AI Short Film Workflow From Zero
tutorials.descriptionZh: 从剧本、分镜、提示词、镜头连续性到最终剪辑，拆解一条适合个人创作者的 AI 短片流程。
tutorials.descriptionEn: A practical pipeline for solo creators: script, storyboard, prompts, shot continuity, and final edit.

tutorials.titleZh: 角色一致性提示词模板
tutorials.descriptionZh: 如何用角色卡、镜头词、服装词和负面词，让一个角色在多个镜头里保持稳定。
tutorials.descriptionEn: Use character cards, camera terms, wardrobe anchors, and negative prompts to keep a character stable across shots.

journal.bodyZh: 新的站点会把作品、教程和创作日志统一管理，并为后续上线真正后台打好结构。
journal.bodyEn: The refreshed site unifies works, tutorials, and journal notes while preparing for a real publishing workflow.
